rationale: Stage E1 implementation is complete and well-structured. The `mcpText` helper consolidates ~100 literal sites into a single bounded construction point, with a self-enforcing AST test (`TestEvidencePrimitiveUsage`) that prevents regression. REST handlers (`handleReadDocument`, `handleAgentWorkerPrompt` — switched to JSON, `handleAgentSessionDetail`) and `loadExecutionBundleDetail` all clamp via `evidence.ClampOutput`. Bead-spec tension on `state_executions.go` (truncated/original_bytes can't surface without touching the GraphQL Execution type, which is explicitly out-of-scope for E1) is handled pragmatically: bodies are clamped at load time, metadata surfacing deferred to E2.
